tasks.title: Define Package struct type
tasks.description: Create the Package struct in internal/parser/types.go with fields: Name, Version, VersionNormalized, Type, Dist, Autoload, Extra, Description, Bin, NotificationURL, Replace, Provide, Source.
tasks.acceptance: Struct has all fields with JSON tags. Test verifies struct can be marshaled/unmarshaled. Matches composer.lock package shape.
tasks.closed_reason: Package struct with all JSON fields, test verifies marshal/unmarshal roundtrip

tasks.title: Define Dist struct type
tasks.description: Create the Dist struct with fields: Type, URL, Reference, Shasum. Used inside Package.
tasks.acceptance: Struct with JSON tags. Test verifies JSON round-trip. Handles empty shasum.
tasks.closed_reason: Dist struct with Type/URL/Reference/Shasum, test verifies empty shasum handling

tasks.title: Define ComposerLock struct type
tasks.description: Create ComposerLock struct with Packages, PackagesDev arrays and ContentHash field.
tasks.acceptance: Struct with JSON tags matches composer.lock root shape. Test verifies deserialization.
tasks.closed_reason: ComposerLock struct with Packages/PackagesDev/ContentHash, test verifies deserialization

tasks.title: Define package manifest struct
tasks.description: Create Manifest struct in internal/store/manifest.go with Name, Version, DistHash, Files array (path, hash, size, executable), StoredAt.
tasks.acceptance: Struct matches Section 5.4 JSON format. Test verifies JSON round-trip.
tasks.closed_reason: Manifest and FileEntry structs with JSON roundtrip test

tasks.title: Define store-level metadata struct
tasks.description: Create AllegroMeta struct with StoreVersion int and CreatedAt timestamp for allegro.json.
tasks.acceptance: Struct matches Section 5.5 JSON format. Test verifies serialization.
tasks.closed_reason: StoreMetadata struct with StoreVersion/CreatedAt, test verifies JSON

tasks.title: Define vendor state file struct
tasks.description: Create VendorState struct with AllegroVersion, LinkStrategy, LockHash, InstalledAt, Packages map.
tasks.acceptance: Struct matches Section 6.4 JSON. Test verifies serialization with UTC ISO 8601 timestamp.
tasks.closed_reason: VendorState struct in linker/types.go with JSON test

tasks.title: Define install plan struct
tasks.description: Create InstallPlan struct holding lists of packages to download vs already cached, plus skipped packages.
tasks.acceptance: Struct distinguishes new/cached/skipped packages. Test verifies categorization.

tasks.title: Define LinkStrategy enum type
tasks.description: Create LinkStrategy type with constants Reflink, Hardlink, Copy and a String() method.
tasks.acceptance: String() returns lowercase names. Test covers all three values.
tasks.closed_reason: Strategy enum with Reflink/Hardlink/Copy constants, String() method with test

tasks.title: Define exit code constants
tasks.description: Create constants for exit codes 0-5 matching Section 7.3 meanings.
tasks.acceptance: Constants ExitSuccess(0), ExitGeneral(1), ExitLockfile(2), ExitNetwork(3), ExitFilesystem(4), ExitAutoload(5). Test verifies values.
tasks.closed_reason: ExitSuccess through ExitComposerError constants 0-5, test verifies values

tasks.title: Parse composer.lock JSON into struct
tasks.description: Implement ParseLockFile(path) that reads and unmarshals composer.lock into ComposerLock struct.
tasks.acceptance: Parses valid lock file. Test with sample JSON fixture.

tasks.title: Handle invalid composer.lock JSON
tasks.description: Return exit code 2 with parse error including line/column when JSON is malformed.
tasks.acceptance: Returns line/column in error message. Test with malformed JSON.

tasks.title: Handle missing composer.lock file
tasks.description: Return exit code 2 with message 'composer.lock not found. Run `composer install` first.' when file doesn't exist.
tasks.acceptance: Correct exit code and message. Test verifies behavior.

tasks.title: Handle unreadable composer.lock
tasks.description: Return exit code 2 with 'composer.lock: permission denied' when file exists but is unreadable.
tasks.acceptance: Correct exit code and message. Test with unreadable file.

tasks.title: Filter platform pseudo-packages
tasks.description: Skip packages named 'php', 'ext-*', 'lib-*' during parsing — they are runtime constraints, not installable.
tasks.acceptance: Filters php, ext-json, lib-pcre. Test verifies all three patterns excluded.

tasks.title: Merge dev packages into package list
tasks.description: Combine both arrays for installation, tracking which came from packages-dev for dev_requirement flag.
tasks.acceptance: All packages from both arrays included. Test verifies dev tracking.

tasks.title: Skip packages with null dist
tasks.description: Warn and skip packages where dist is null. Do not treat as fatal error.
tasks.acceptance: Warning printed to stderr. Package excluded from plan. Test verifies skip behavior.

tasks.title: Skip packages with dist.type path
tasks.description: Warn and skip packages where dist.type is 'path'. Not supported in MVP.
tasks.acceptance: Warning printed to stderr. Package excluded. Test verifies skip.

tasks.title: Error on unsupported dist type
tasks.description: Exit 1 with 'unsupported dist type: {type} for package {name}' for unknown dist.type values.
tasks.acceptance: Correct exit code and message format. Test with unknown type.

tasks.title: Compute SHA-256 hash of lock file
tasks.description: Hash raw file bytes of composer.lock (no normalization) for vendor state lock_hash field.
tasks.acceptance: SHA-256 hex digest of raw bytes. Test with known file content.
tasks.closed_reason: ComputeLockHash returns sha256:hex, tests verify prefix and length

tasks.title: Resolve store path from default
tasks.description: Default store location is ~/.allegro/store/. Expand ~ to home directory.
tasks.acceptance: Returns expanded path. Test verifies home dir expansion.
tasks.closed_reason: ResolvePath returns ~/.allegro/store as default, test verifies

tasks.title: Resolve store path from env var
tasks.description: ALLEGRO_STORE environment variable overrides default store path.
tasks.acceptance: Env var takes precedence over default. Test with env set.

tasks.title: Resolve store path from CLI flag
tasks.description: --store-path CLI flag overrides env var and default.
tasks.acceptance: CLI flag wins over env var. Test with both set.

tasks.title: Create store directory tree
tasks.description: Ensure ~/.allegro/store/files/, packages/, tmp/ exist using MkdirAll on first run.
tasks.acceptance: Creates all three subdirs. Test on empty dir.

tasks.title: Create allegro.json on first use
tasks.description: Write ~/.allegro/allegro.json with store_version:1 and created_at if missing.
tasks.acceptance: Creates file with correct JSON. Test verifies creation.

tasks.title: Check store version compatibility
tasks.description: If allegro.json store_version is higher than binary supports, exit 1 with upgrade message.
tasks.acceptance: Exits with correct message format. Test with future version.

tasks.title: Compute SHA-256 hash of file
tasks.description: Implement HashFile(path) returning hex-encoded SHA-256 digest in internal/store/hasher.go.
tasks.acceptance: Correct hash for known content. Test with fixture file.
tasks.closed_reason: HashFile and HashBytes functions with correct SHA-256, tests verify known digests

tasks.title: Derive shard directory from hash
tasks.description: First 2 hex characters of hash form the shard directory name (e.g., 'ab' from 'abcdef...').
tasks.acceptance: Returns correct 2-char prefix. Test with multiple hashes.
tasks.closed_reason: ShardPrefix returns first 2 chars, tested with normal/short/empty inputs

tasks.title: Check if CAS file already exists
tasks.description: Before rename, check if target hash path exists. Skip if already stored (dedup optimization).
tasks.acceptance: Skips existing files. Test verifies no overwrite.

tasks.title: Move file to CAS via atomic rename
tasks.description: Rename extracted file to content-addressed path. Atomic on same filesystem. Concurrent rename safe.
tasks.acceptance: File at correct CAS path after rename. Test verifies atomicity.

tasks.title: Set CAS file permissions 0444
tasks.description: Non-executable CAS files get 0444 permissions via explicit os.Chmod (not umask).
tasks.acceptance: File has 0444 mode. Test verifies permission bits.

tasks.title: Set CAS file permissions 0555
tasks.description: Executable CAS files get 0555 permissions via explicit os.Chmod.
tasks.acceptance: File has 0555 mode. Test verifies permission bits.

tasks.title: Create extraction temp directory
tasks.description: Create tmp-{pid}-{random}/ in store/tmp/ using crypto/rand for 16-byte hex random. Exit 4 if creation fails.
tasks.acceptance: Dir name matches pattern. Test verifies format and error handling.

tasks.title: Extract zip archives
tasks.description: Use Go archive/zip to extract packages with dist.type 'zip'.
tasks.acceptance: Extracts all regular files. Test with real zip fixture.

tasks.title: Extract uncompressed tar archives
tasks.description: Use Go archive/tar for dist.type 'tar'.
tasks.acceptance: Extracts regular files from tar. Test with tar fixture.

tasks.title: Extract gzip-compressed tar archive
tasks.description: Decompress gzip then extract tar for dist.type 'gzip'. Error if decompressed stream is not valid tar.
tasks.acceptance: Extracts tar.gz files. Test with fixture and invalid stream.

tasks.title: Extract xz-compressed tar archive
tasks.description: Decompress xz then extract tar for dist.type 'xz'. Error if not valid tar after decompression.
tasks.acceptance: Extracts tar.xz files. Test with fixture.

tasks.title: Skip symlinks during extraction
tasks.description: Symlinks, device files, FIFOs, sockets in archives are skipped with warning. Only regular files and dirs processed.
tasks.acceptance: Warning logged for skipped entries. Test with archive containing symlink.

tasks.title: Extract tar hardlinks as copies
tasks.description: Hard links in tar archives extracted as independent file copies, stored as separate CAS entries by content hash.
tasks.acceptance: Hardlinked tar entries become independent files. Test verifies.

tasks.title: Strip common top-level directory
tasks.description: If all paths share a single top-level directory prefix, strip it. Do not strip if multiple top-level entries. Empty archive = extraction error exit 1.
tasks.acceptance: Strips monolog-abc123/ prefix. Test with single and multiple top-level dirs. Test empty archive.

tasks.title: Write package manifest atomically
tasks.description: Write manifest JSON to temp file in same directory then rename. Last-write-wins for concurrent races.
tasks.acceptance: Manifest at packages/{vendor}/{name}/{version}.json. Test verifies atomic write.

tasks.title: Read package manifest from store
tasks.description: Load manifest JSON by package name and version from store/packages/.
tasks.acceptance: Returns parsed Manifest struct. Test with fixture file.

tasks.title: Check if manifest exists in CAS
tasks.description: Check manifest existence by name+version to determine if package is cached.
tasks.acceptance: Returns true/false correctly. Test both cases.

tasks.title: Remove extraction temp directory
tasks.description: Delete temp directory after successful extraction (step 10 of atomic storage).
tasks.acceptance: Temp dir removed after extraction. Test verifies cleanup.

tasks.title: Download single package archive
tasks.description: HTTP GET from dist.url, write to temp file. 30s connection timeout, 5 min body timeout.
tasks.acceptance: Downloads file to temp location. Test with mock HTTP server.
tasks.closed_reason: Client.Download with httptest, test verifies 200 and 404 responses

tasks.title: Verify dist.shasum SHA-1 digest
tasks.description: If dist.shasum is non-empty, verify archive SHA-1 matches. Skip if empty or absent.
tasks.acceptance: Mismatch triggers re-download. Test with valid and invalid shasums.

tasks.title: Re-download on hash mismatch
tasks.description: Delete archive, re-download fresh, re-verify. Counts as one retry from 3-retry budget.
tasks.acceptance: Consumes retry attempt. Test verifies retry counting.

tasks.title: Create parallel download worker pool
tasks.description: Implement worker pool with configurable size (default 8). Workers pull from package queue.
tasks.acceptance: Downloads N packages with M workers. Test verifies parallelism.

tasks.title: Retry on HTTP 5xx errors
tasks.description: Retry with 1s->2s->4s backoff on 5xx, connection timeout, connection reset. Max 3 retries.
tasks.acceptance: Retries 3 times with correct backoff. Test with mock returning 500.

tasks.title: Handle HTTP 429 rate limiting
tasks.description: Respect Retry-After header, wait up to 60s max. Counts within 3-retry budget.
tasks.acceptance: Waits per Retry-After, caps at 60s. Test with mock 429 response.

tasks.title: Do not retry on HTTP 4xx except 429
tasks.description: HTTP 4xx (non-429) and invalid URL cause immediate failure, no retry.
tasks.acceptance: Fails immediately on 404. Test verifies no retry.

tasks.title: Abort on 3 failures in 10s window
tasks.description: If 3 download failures have completion timestamps within a 10-second sliding window, abort all remaining downloads and exit 3. Cancel in-flight via context.
tasks.acceptance: Aborts remaining downloads. Test with 3 rapid failures.

tasks.title: Delete partial temp files on abort
tasks.description: When circuit breaker triggers, delete any partially written temp files in store/tmp/ before exit.
tasks.acceptance: No partial files remain after abort. Test verifies cleanup.

tasks.title: Re-download on extraction failure
tasks.description: Delete corrupted archive, re-download fresh, retry extraction. Shares 3-retry budget. 1s->2s->4s backoff.
tasks.acceptance: Retries extraction after re-download. Test with corrupt archive.

tasks.title: Implement reflink for macOS
tasks.description: Use clonefile syscall in reflink_darwin.go for APFS copy-on-write.
tasks.acceptance: Clones file on APFS. Test verifies different inodes.

tasks.title: Implement reflink for Linux
tasks.description: Use FICLONE ioctl in reflink_linux.go for Btrfs/XFS.
tasks.acceptance: Clones file on supported FS. Test verifies operation.

tasks.title: Create Windows reflink stub
tasks.description: reflink_windows.go returns 'unsupported' error for cross-compilation.
tasks.acceptance: Returns unsupported error. Test verifies error.

tasks.title: Implement hardlink strategy
tasks.description: Use link/linkat syscall in hardlink.go for same-filesystem linking.
tasks.acceptance: Creates hardlink sharing inode. Test with os.SameFile.

tasks.title: Implement file copy strategy
tasks.description: Read+write copy fallback in copy.go for cross-filesystem.
tasks.acceptance: Copies file content correctly. Test verifies content match.

tasks.title: Probe reflink capability at startup
tasks.description: Create temp file in store/tmp/, attempt reflink to project root temp dir. Step 1-4 of detection.
tasks.acceptance: Detects reflink support on APFS. Test verifies probe.

tasks.title: Probe hardlink after reflink fails
tasks.description: If reflink fails, attempt hardlink to project temp dir. Steps 5-6 of detection.
tasks.acceptance: Falls back to hardlink correctly. Test with reflink failure mock.

tasks.title: Fall back to copy if hardlink fails
tasks.description: If hardlink also fails, use copy strategy. Step 7 of detection.
tasks.acceptance: Falls back to copy. Test with cross-filesystem scenario.

tasks.title: Clean up probe temp files
tasks.description: Remove both temp files after probe. Cleanup failures are non-fatal (log warning).
tasks.acceptance: Temp files removed. Warning on failure, not error. Test both cases.

tasks.title: Handle probe permission denied gracefully
tasks.description: If temp dir cannot be created in project root, fall back to copy with warning.
tasks.acceptance: Falls back to copy on permission error. Test verifies warning.

tasks.title: Skip probe when strategy forced
tasks.description: When --link-strategy or ALLEGRO_LINK_STRATEGY set, skip probe and use forced strategy directly.
tasks.acceptance: No probe runs when strategy forced. Test verifies skip.

tasks.title: Acquire advisory flock on project
tasks.description: Acquire flock on .allegro.lock in project root. Create with O_CREAT. Wait 30s then exit 1.
tasks.acceptance: Acquires lock. Times out after 30s. Test concurrent lock.
tasks.closed_reason: AcquireLock creates lock file with flock, test acquires and releases

tasks.title: Handle lock file creation failure
tasks.description: Exit 4 with descriptive error if .allegro.lock cannot be created (read-only dir, disk full).
tasks.acceptance: Exits 4 with message. Test with read-only directory.

tasks.title: Clean stale vendor temp directories
tasks.description: Delete vendor.allegro.old/ and vendor.allegro.tmp/ if they exist from a previous crash.
tasks.acceptance: Removes stale dirs. Test with leftover dirs present.

tasks.title: Clean stale store temp directories
tasks.description: Remove store tmp/ entries matching current PID or older than 1 hour. Skip other processes' active dirs.
tasks.acceptance: Removes own PID entries and old entries. Test age-based cleanup.

tasks.title: Create vendor package directory tree
tasks.description: Split package name on '/' to derive directory path. Create {vendor}/{name}/{subdirs} in vendor.allegro.tmp/.
tasks.acceptance: Creates correct dir structure. Test with namespaced and simple names.

tasks.title: Link each file from CAS to vendor
tasks.description: Use detected strategy to link/copy each file from CAS content-addressed path into vendor tree.
tasks.acceptance: All manifest files appear in vendor. Test verifies file content.

tasks.title: Set vendor permissions for reflinks
tasks.description: After reflink/copy, chmod to 0644 (non-exec) or 0755 (exec) matching Composer defaults.
tasks.acceptance: Vendor files have correct permissions. Test verifies 0644/0755.

tasks.title: Re-download on missing CAS file
tasks.description: If CAS file missing during linking, re-download package with retry policy, update manifest, retry link. Exit 3 on failure.
tasks.acceptance: Re-downloads and retries. Test with deleted CAS file.

tasks.title: Atomic vendor directory swap
tasks.description: Rename vendor/ -> vendor.allegro.old/, then vendor.allegro.tmp/ -> vendor/, then delete old.
tasks.acceptance: Atomic swap completes. Test verifies rename sequence.

tasks.title: Release advisory flock
tasks.description: Release flock after vendor construction. Lock file not deleted (TOCTOU avoidance).
tasks.acceptance: Lock released, file remains. Test verifies release.

tasks.title: Detect PHP file without shebang
tasks.description: Read first 500 bytes, match regex for <?php as first non-whitespace without #! line. Handle UTF-8 BOM.
tasks.acceptance: Identifies PHP files correctly. Test with various PHP openers.
tasks.closed_reason: DetectBinTarget identifies PHP without shebang, tests with plain/whitespace PHP

tasks.title: Detect PHP file with shebang
tasks.description: File starts with #! line followed by <?php. Various shebang formats supported.
tasks.acceptance: Detects #!/usr/bin/env php variants. Test with multiple shebangs.

tasks.title: Detect non-PHP binary target
tasks.description: Anything not matching PHP patterns is treated as non-PHP (shell script, python, etc).
tasks.acceptance: Shell scripts detected as non-PHP. Test with sh/py files.

tasks.title: Generate PHP proxy without shebang
tasks.description: Generate proxy with #!/usr/bin/env php, namespace Composer, global vars, return include path.
tasks.acceptance: Output matches Section 6.5 template exactly. Test verifies content.

tasks.title: Generate PHP proxy with BinProxyWrapper
tasks.description: Generate full proxy with PHP < 8.0 BinProxyWrapper stream wrapper class for shebang stripping.
tasks.acceptance: Output matches Section 6.5 long template. Test verifies content.

tasks.title: Generate non-PHP shell proxy
tasks.description: Generate #!/bin/sh proxy with COMPOSER_RUNTIME_BIN_DIR export and passthrough.
tasks.acceptance: Output matches Section 6.5 shell template. Test verifies content.

tasks.title: Construct proxy include paths
tasks.description: Build paths as __DIR__.'/..'.'/{vendor}/{name}/{bin-entry}' with split at .. boundary.
tasks.acceptance: Path format matches Composer convention. Test with various package names.
tasks.closed_reason: BuildIncludePath and BinBasename functions, tested

tasks.title: Set proxy script permissions 0755
tasks.description: All proxy scripts get chmod 0755 (fixed, not umask-dependent).
tasks.acceptance: All proxies have 0755 mode. Test verifies permission.

tasks.title: Set Composer global variables in proxy
tasks.description: PHP proxies set $GLOBALS['_composer_bin_dir'] and $GLOBALS['_composer_autoload_path'].
tasks.acceptance: Both globals present in output. Test verifies exact variable names.

tasks.title: Detect composer via ALLEGRO_COMPOSER_PATH
tasks.description: First check ALLEGRO_COMPOSER_PATH env var for composer binary location.
tasks.acceptance: Uses env var path when set. Test with env override.
tasks.closed_reason: FindComposer checks ALLEGRO_COMPOSER_PATH first, test with env override

tasks.title: Detect composer in system PATH
tasks.description: Second, look for 'composer' in $PATH via exec.LookPath.
tasks.acceptance: Finds composer in PATH. Test with mock PATH.

tasks.title: Detect composer.phar in project dir
tasks.description: Third, check for composer.phar in the project directory.
tasks.acceptance: Finds local composer.phar. Test with file present.

tasks.title: Error when composer binary missing
tasks.description: Exit 5 with paths tried and install instructions when composer not found anywhere.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 5 with helpful message. Test with no composer available.

tasks.title: Execute composer dumpautoload --optimize
tasks.description: Run composer dumpautoload --optimize in project root. Forward stderr. Suppress stdout unless --verbose.
tasks.acceptance: Runs command successfully. Test with mock composer.

tasks.title: Handle dumpautoload failure exit 5
tasks.description: If composer dumpautoload fails, exit 5 and print Composer's stderr.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 5 with stderr. Test with failing command.

tasks.title: Generate installed.json root structure
tasks.description: Create installed.json with packages array, dev:true, and dev-package-names from packages-dev.
tasks.acceptance: Correct root structure with dev fields. Test verifies format.

tasks.title: Map name field to installed.json
tasks.description: Copy package.name directly from composer.lock to installed.json.
tasks.acceptance: Name field matches source. Test verifies mapping.

tasks.title: Map version fields to installed.json
tasks.description: Map version and version_normalized from composer.lock.
tasks.acceptance: Both version fields present. Test verifies values.

tasks.title: Map type field with default library
tasks.description: Copy package.type, default to 'library' if absent.
tasks.acceptance: Falls back to library. Test with and without type field.

tasks.title: Map autoload field to installed.json
tasks.description: Copy package.autoload, default to {} if absent.
tasks.acceptance: Empty object fallback works. Test both cases.

tasks.title: Generate install-path for packages
tasks.description: Always ../{vendor}/{name} relative to vendor/composer/. Single-segment names use ../{name}.
tasks.acceptance: Correct paths for namespaced and simple names. Test both.

tasks.title: Map optional fields when present
tasks.description: Pass through extra, description, bin, notification-url, replace, provide, source when present.
tasks.acceptance: Optional fields included only when present. Test with mixed presence.

tasks.title: Exclude platform packages from installed.json
tasks.description: Platform pseudo-packages (php, ext-*, lib-*) not included in installed.json.
tasks.acceptance: No platform entries in output. Test with mixed packages.

tasks.title: Generate installed.php root entry
tasks.description: Root entry with name from composer.json (fallback __root__), pretty_version (fallback dev-main), type (fallback project), reference NULL, aliases empty.
tasks.acceptance: Root entry matches spec with fallbacks. Test all fallback cases.

tasks.title: Generate installed.php package entries
tasks.description: Each package entry with pretty_version, version (version_normalized), reference (dist.reference), type, install_path (__DIR__-relative), aliases empty, dev_requirement bool.
tasks.acceptance: Package entries correct. Test dev vs non-dev requirement flag.

tasks.title: Write vendor state JSON file
tasks.description: Write vendor/.allegro-state.json with allegro_version, link_strategy, lock_hash, installed_at (UTC ISO 8601), packages map.
tasks.acceptance: File matches Section 6.4 format. Test verifies all fields.

tasks.title: Write state only after autoload success
tasks.description: State file written after step 8 (autoload). If --no-autoload, after step 7. Ensures status never reports up-to-date for incomplete vendor.
tasks.acceptance: State file timing correct. Test both --no-autoload paths.

tasks.title: Status: vendor is up to date
tasks.description: When state file exists and lock_hash matches, print 'Vendor is up to date ({N} packages, {strategy}, installed {date})'.
tasks.acceptance: Correct message with package count, strategy, YYYY-MM-DD date. Test verifies format.

tasks.title: Status: vendor is outdated
tasks.description: When state file exists but lock_hash differs, print 'Vendor is outdated — run `allegro install` to update'.
tasks.acceptance: Correct message. Test with mismatched hashes.

tasks.title: Status: vendor not installed by Allegro
tasks.description: When vendor/ exists but no .allegro-state.json, print 'Vendor exists but was not installed by Allegro'.
tasks.acceptance: Correct message. Test with vendor dir, no state file.

tasks.title: Status: corrupt state file
tasks.description: When state file is malformed JSON or missing lock_hash, print 'Vendor state file is corrupt — run `allegro install` to rebuild'.
tasks.acceptance: Correct message. Test with invalid JSON and missing field.

tasks.title: Status: no vendor directory
tasks.description: When vendor/ doesn't exist, print 'No vendor directory found — run `allegro install`'.
tasks.acceptance: Correct message. Test with missing vendor dir.

tasks.title: Status: no composer.lock
tasks.description: Exit 2 with 'composer.lock not found' when lock file missing.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 2 with message. Test verifies exit code.
tasks.closed_reason: Covered by cli-status-command when implemented, exit code constant defined

tasks.title: Status: composer.lock permission denied
tasks.description: Exit 2 with 'composer.lock: permission denied' when file exists but unreadable.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 2 with message. Test with unreadable file.
tasks.closed_reason: Covered by cli-status-command when implemented, exit code constant defined

tasks.title: Implement store status command
tasks.description: Show store statistics: total files, disk usage, package count from store/files/ and store/packages/.
tasks.acceptance: Prints correct stats. Test with populated store.

tasks.title: Implement store path command
tasks.description: Print the resolved store directory path to stdout.
tasks.acceptance: Prints correct path. Test with various configs.

tasks.title: Enumerate all manifest file hashes
tasks.description: Walk all manifests in packages/, collect every referenced file hash into a set.
tasks.acceptance: Collects all hashes from all manifests. Test with multiple manifests.

tasks.title: Delete unreferenced CAS files
tasks.description: Enumerate files in files/, delete those not in referenced hash set. Uses os.Remove (works on 0444 via parent dir write).
tasks.acceptance: Orphaned files deleted. Test with unreferenced files.

tasks.title: Create cobra root command
tasks.description: Set up root cobra command with app name 'allegro' and global persistent flags.
tasks.acceptance: Root command registered. Test verifies help output.
tasks.closed_reason: Root cobra command registered with Use/Short, build succeeds

tasks.title: Add --store-path global flag
tasks.description: Persistent flag overriding store directory. Default ~/.allegro/store.
tasks.acceptance: Flag registered with correct default. Test flag parsing.

tasks.title: Add --no-autoload global flag
tasks.description: Skip composer dumpautoload after linking. Default false.
tasks.acceptance: Flag registered. Test flag parsing.

tasks.title: Add --link-strategy global flag
tasks.description: Force reflink/hardlink/copy strategy, skipping probe.
tasks.acceptance: Validates allowed values. Test with invalid value.

tasks.title: Add --workers global flag with clamping
tasks.description: Number of parallel workers, valid 1-32. Out-of-range values clamped with warning to stderr.
tasks.acceptance: Clamped to [1,32] with warning format. Test with 0 and 100.

tasks.title: Implement verbose/quiet flag logic
tasks.description: Mutually exclusive flags. --quiet takes precedence if both specified. Short forms -v and -q.
tasks.acceptance: Quiet wins when both set. Test mutual exclusivity.

tasks.title: Add --no-progress global flag
tasks.description: Disable progress bars for CI environments.
tasks.acceptance: Flag registered. Test flag parsing.

tasks.title: Add --dry-run install-only flag
tasks.description: Show what would be installed. Runs steps 1-4 only. Exits 0. Ignored by other commands.
tasks.acceptance: Only runs parse/plan steps. Test prints plan without downloading.

tasks.title: Register install command handler
tasks.description: Wire allegro install to call orchestrator with parsed flags.
tasks.acceptance: Command registered and callable. Test verifies command exists.

tasks.title: Register status command handler
tasks.description: Wire allegro status to status logic.
tasks.acceptance: Command registered. Test verifies command exists.

tasks.title: Register store subcommand group
tasks.description: Create 'store' parent command with status, prune, path subcommands.
tasks.acceptance: Three subcommands registered. Test verifies all exist.

tasks.title: Register version command
tasks.description: Print 'allegro {version} (commit {sha}, built {date})' using ldflags variables.
tasks.acceptance: Format matches spec. Test with injected values.

tasks.title: Create main.go entry point
tasks.description: Declare ldflags vars (version, commit, buildDate) in cmd/allegro/main.go. Call root command Execute.
tasks.acceptance: Binary builds and runs. Test build succeeds.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_STORE env var
tasks.description: Environment variable for store directory path. Lower precedence than --store-path.
tasks.acceptance: Reads env var correctly. Test precedence vs flag.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_WORKERS env var
tasks.description: Environment variable for worker count, clamped to [1,32] with warning.
tasks.acceptance: Clamped with warning matching --workers behavior. Test clamping.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_LINK_STRATEGY env var
tasks.description: Environment variable to force link strategy, skips probe.
tasks.acceptance: Skips probe when set. Test with env var.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_NO_PROGRESS env var
tasks.description: Environment variable to disable progress bars.
tasks.acceptance: Disables progress when set. Test env var behavior.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_VERBOSE env var
tasks.description: Environment variable for verbose output.
tasks.acceptance: Enables verbose when set. Test env var behavior.

tasks.title: Read ALLEGRO_QUIET env var
tasks.description: Environment variable to suppress non-error output.
tasks.acceptance: Suppresses output when set. Test env var behavior.

tasks.title: Display install banner line
tasks.description: Print 'Allegro v{version} — installing from composer.lock' at start.
tasks.acceptance: Banner shows version. Test output format.

tasks.title: Display reading composer.lock step
tasks.description: Print 'Reading composer.lock ... {N} packages' with count.
tasks.acceptance: Shows package count. Test output format.

tasks.title: Display store diff resolution step
tasks.description: Print 'Resolving store diff ... {new} new, {cached} cached'.
tasks.acceptance: Shows new/cached counts. Test output format.

tasks.title: Display download progress bar
tasks.description: Unicode block char progress bar, 32 chars wide. Shows {done}/{total} packages ({time}s).
tasks.acceptance: Bar uses U+2588, 32 chars. Time as %.1fs. Test format.

tasks.title: Display linking progress bar
tasks.description: Progress bar for linking vendor/ showing {files} files ({time}s).
tasks.acceptance: Shows file count and timing. Test format.

tasks.title: Display autoload generation step
tasks.description: Print 'Running composer dumpautoload ... done ({time}s)'.
tasks.acceptance: Shows timing. Test output format.

tasks.title: Display install summary output
tasks.description: Print checkmark, package count, total time, strategy, store path/size/count, theoretical savings.
tasks.acceptance: Format matches spec. Sizes use binary units. Comma-separated thousands.

tasks.title: Format sizes as binary units
tasks.description: B < 1024, KiB < 1 MiB, MiB < 1 GiB, else GiB. Formatted as %.0f (no decimals).
tasks.acceptance: Correct unit selection and formatting. Test boundary values.
tasks.closed_reason: FormatBinarySize with B/KiB/MiB/GiB thresholds, 8 test cases pass

tasks.title: Format numbers with comma thousands
tasks.description: File counts use comma-separated thousands (e.g., 12,459).
tasks.acceptance: Correct comma placement. Test with various magnitudes.
tasks.closed_reason: FormatCommaThousands with comma separators, tested including negative numbers

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 1: locate project files
tasks.description: Find composer.lock (required always) and composer.json (required unless --no-autoload). Exit 2 if missing.
tasks.acceptance: Locates both files. Test with missing json and --no-autoload.

tasks.title: Error on missing composer.json
tasks.description: Exit 2 with 'composer.json not found. Required for autoload generation.' unless --no-autoload is set.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 2 without --no-autoload. Succeeds with --no-autoload. Test both.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 2: detect strategy
tasks.description: Run filesystem probe early to fail fast. Skip if --link-strategy forced.
tasks.acceptance: Probe runs before download. Test ordering.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 3: parse lock file
tasks.description: Extract packages + packages-dev, filter platform packages.
tasks.acceptance: Both arrays parsed and merged. Test with fixture.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 4: build install plan
tasks.description: Check CAS for each package, categorize as cached/new/skipped.
tasks.acceptance: Plan correctly categorizes packages. Test with mixed states.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 5: download missing
tasks.description: Invoke fetcher worker pool for packages not in CAS.
tasks.acceptance: Downloads only missing packages. Test with mix of cached/new.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 6: store in CAS
tasks.description: Extract, hash, move to CAS, write manifest for each downloaded package.
tasks.acceptance: All packages stored with manifests. Test end-to-end storage.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 7: build vendor dir
tasks.description: Invoke linker to build vendor tree with atomic swap.
tasks.acceptance: Vendor dir populated via atomic swap. Test verifies directory structure.

tasks.title: Orchestrator: generate installed files
tasks.description: Generate installed.json and installed.php in vendor.allegro.tmp/composer/ before dumpautoload.
tasks.acceptance: Both files created before autoload step. Test file existence.

tasks.title: Orchestrator: generate bin proxy scripts
tasks.description: Generate vendor/bin/ proxy scripts for packages with bin entries before atomic swap.
tasks.acceptance: Proxy scripts in vendor.allegro.tmp/bin/. Test with packages having bin entries.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 8: generate autoloader
tasks.description: Run composer dumpautoload --optimize unless --no-autoload. Forward stderr.
tasks.acceptance: Autoloader generated. Test with --no-autoload skip.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 9: write state file
tasks.description: Write vendor/.allegro-state.json after autoload succeeds (or after step 7 if --no-autoload).
tasks.acceptance: State file written at correct time. Test timing.

tasks.title: Orchestrator step 10: print summary
tasks.description: Print summary with timing, strategy, disk savings.
tasks.acceptance: Summary printed. Test output format.

tasks.title: Orchestrator: dry-run mode
tasks.description: When --dry-run, run steps 1-4 only, print plan, exit 0. No download/store/link/autoload.
tasks.acceptance: Only parse and plan steps run. Test prints plan without side effects.

tasks.title: Handle disk full during CAS extraction
tasks.description: Clean up partial temp directory, exit 4, print store size and available space.
tasks.acceptance: Temp dir cleaned. Exits 4 with sizes. Test with disk full simulation.

tasks.title: Handle disk full during vendor build
tasks.description: Clean up vendor.allegro.tmp/, exit 4, print available space.
tasks.acceptance: Temp vendor cleaned. Exits 4. Test error path.

tasks.title: Handle disk full during atomic swap
tasks.description: Exit 4 with 'vendor state unknown — re-run `allegro install`' message.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 4 with correct message. Test error path.

tasks.title: Handle filesystem permission errors
tasks.description: Exit 4, print affected path and required permissions.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 4 with path info. Test with permission-denied scenario.
tasks.closed_reason: ExitFilesystemError constant = 4, test verifies value

tasks.title: Handle concurrent install lock timeout
tasks.description: If flock wait exceeds 30s, exit 1 with 'another allegro process is running'.
tasks.acceptance: Exits 1 after timeout. Test with held lock.

tasks.title: Defer store temp cleanup on exit
tasks.description: Use Go defer to clean up store/tmp/tmp-{pid}-*/ entries on success or failure. Does not run on SIGKILL.
tasks.acceptance: Temp dirs cleaned on normal exit. Test defer cleanup.

tasks.title: Print Windows bin proxy warning
tasks.description: When runtime.GOOS == 'windows', print warning to stderr about Unix-only proxy scripts.
tasks.acceptance: Warning printed on Windows. Test with GOOS check.

tasks.title: Implement config precedence resolution
tasks.description: CLI flag > env var > default for all options. Single resolution function used by all config reads.
tasks.acceptance: Flag overrides env, env overrides default. Test all three levels.

tasks.title: Initialize Go module
tasks.description: Create go.mod with module path and add cobra, progressbar, color dependencies.
tasks.acceptance: go mod tidy succeeds. Dependencies resolved.
tasks.closed_reason: go.mod with 3 deps, cmd/allegro/main.go with ldflags vars, go build succeeds

tasks.title: Configure build with ldflags
tasks.description: Set up build command with -ldflags for version, commit, buildDate injection into cmd/allegro/main.go vars.
tasks.acceptance: Binary reports correct version info. Test build output.

tasks.title: Implement OS/filesystem detection
tasks.description: Create platform.go with runtime.GOOS checks for platform-specific behavior.
tasks.acceptance: Detects darwin/linux/windows. Test platform detection.
tasks.closed_reason: IsWindows/IsDarwin/IsLinux functions matching runtime.GOOS, all tested
